jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at mfine
jsonLd.description:
mfine invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About mfine:
mfine is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with mfine!
